app.title: Searchable field-level encryption on Supabase with CipherStash
app.author: dandraper
proposed_tests: Install CipherStash and encrypt a Supabase table
Query the encrypted table with CipherStash
Compare throughput and latency with encryption
Test data recovery with correct decryption key
